repo_prior_art.cite: doc/API.md ExactID/PartialID seed catalogue; pid_dynamic_iv_compliance_v2 is dynamic IV mixture splitting, not network graph-completion bounds

published_prior_art.cite: SchroderOprescuFeuerriegelKallus2026 gives sharp exposure-mapping sensitivity bounds; WeinsteinNevo2026 gives network-misspecification bias/robust estimation, but neither states this shared-completion LP projection

repo_prior_art.cite: none; no in-catalogue network-exposure completion kernel in doc/API.md or closest pid_dynamic_iv_compliance_v2

published_prior_art.cite: SchroderOprescuFeuerriegelKallus2026 is closest for sharp exposure-mapping bounds; Egami2020 and WeinsteinNevo2026 are closest for unobserved/misspecified networks, but none gives shared-edge nonsharpness of product cellwise relaxations

repo_prior_art.cite: none; no in-catalogue capacitated hidden-edge certificate result

published_prior_art.cite: BelloniFangVolfovsky2022 adapts over radii on a known network; YuAiroldiBorgsChayes2022 targets total effects with unknown network structure; neither gives finite graph-completion certificates

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The proposal should add ZhangMohanPearl2023, 'Causal Inference under Interference and Model Uncertainty', which derives bounds for average causal effects under uncertain interaction patterns and is a closer uncertainty/bounds comparator than several general exposure-mapping citations.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: Theta_cell(P) is described by kernels and matching equations, but the proposal never explicitly defines the cellwise target projection or the reference r/Z weights used to compare it to Theta_I(P), so the strict-containment statement is underdefined.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Define Theta_cell(P) as an explicit projection onto a theta_cell(s;Q,Y) formula, including whether the hidden-exposure distribution is Q_i(r|A_i=0,S_i=s) or another reference distribution.
Add a related-work comparison to Zhang, Mohan, and Pearl (2023) and state precisely why their model-uncertainty bounds do not subsume shared local graph-completion compatibility.
Include a minimal four-unit or three-edge witness candidate for Conjecture 1 in the sanity/proof-sketch route so the proposed strict gap is anchored by a concrete finite experiment.

Sharpen Conjecture 2 by naming the exact certificate family intended: Farkas certificate for LP relaxation infeasibility, integer infeasibility certificate, or a specified b-matching/set-covering polyhedral system.

recommended_next_step: Revise the proposal to make the cellwise identified-set functional explicit and add the missed model-uncertainty bounds comparator; the field-tier novelty kernel otherwise survives.
